headline: First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. Announces Appointment of Ashlee Weisser to Chief Financial Officer
summary: CFO Ashlee Weisser First Watch announces the appointment of Ashlee Weisser to CFO BRADENTON, Fla., June 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: FWRG) (“First Watch” or the “Company”), the leading Daytime Dining concept serving breakfast, brunch and lunch, today announced the appointment of Ashlee Weisser to Chief Financial Officer effective June 8, 2026. headline: Cheesecake Factory: Valuation Asymmetry Now Tilts To The Downside
summary: Cheesecake Factory (CAKE) valuation looks stretched vs. peers as traffic weakens and price hikes drive comps. Read the full analysis here.
